hypotheses.name: Cross-seed TF boundary anchor stability + out-degree mechanistic test
hypotheses.method: SVD of centered nonzero embeddings at L2/L3 for main/seed43/seed44. Project to SV5-7. Logistic regression TF vs target. Per-TF signed margin. Cross-seed CV computed. Spearman(mean_margin, TRRUST out-degree).
hypotheses.result_value: r=-0.012, p=0.90; AUROC stable: 0.729-0.762 across seeds; top anchors: STAT4(CV=0.067), BACH2(CV=0.108), ZEB1(CV=0.158)
hypotheses.next_action: TF boundary geometry is reproducible but not driven by hub TFs; retire out-degree mechanistic hypothesis; explore GO annotation overlap for stable anchors

hypotheses.name: Pairwise TF-target 6D distance as edge probability predictor
hypotheses.method: For main seed, 12 layers: SVD of nonzero embeddings, project to SV5-7. L2 distance for 288 pos and 864 neg TRRUST edges. AUROC (small dist = positive). Permutation null (1000 shuffles).
hypotheses.result_value: Max AUROC=0.565 at L9 (perm_p=0.002); mean 0.536; well below 0.62 threshold
hypotheses.next_action: Signal real but too weak for regulatory inference; try higher-dimensional projection (SV2-7 joint) or cosine similarity; or retire this branch

hypotheses.name: Partial Spearman: effective rank vs AUROC controlling for layer depth
hypotheses.method: Residualize ranked eff_rank_full and ranked auroc_joint6d on ranked layer index. Pearson on residuals. Also Lipschitz regularity (mean inter-layer displacement in SV5-7, main seed).
hypotheses.result_value: partial_r=-0.045, p=0.795 vs raw_r=0.855; eff_rank fully collinear with layer (r=-0.997); Lipschitz r=-0.573
hypotheses.next_action: Retire eff_rank as independent predictor; focus on what drives layer-depth AUROC trend; test within-layer variance: do seed-to-seed AUROC differences correlate with eff_rank within a single layer?
